marginal_supplier_representation: Implemented through AL_SD_credit_reuse_QC_ingot_plus_extrusion, combining avoided primary ingot and avoided extrusion burdens as a structured replacement proxy
equivalence_gate: Recovered component must remain defensibly reusable in the same non-structural facade service class, with fit, geometry, and service duty compatible with the displaced application
conditioning_required_before_credit: Deconstruction, handling, cleaning, and degreasing only; no remelting or material transformation
substitution_ratio_yield_mapping: Route basis = 1 kg aluminium. Reuse preparation burdens scaled through the implemented degreasing conversion of 0.185185 m2/kg. Stage D then applies -1 kg canonical ingot credit plus -1 kg avoided extrusion per kg route basis
downscaling_exclusion_rule: If direct reuse in the intended service class is not defensible, the reuse claim is excluded rather than retained at full credit

marginal_supplier_representation: Contemporary implementation uses the canonical Stage D primary-ingot proxy AL_credit_primary_ingot_IAI_NA_QC_elec; prospective interpretation follows the scenario-conditioned aluminium representation documented in Appendix D
equivalence_gate: Output must remain within the defensible billet-equivalent / extrusion-feedstock class after route-side conditioning
conditioning_required_before_credit: Scrap preparation, refining/remelting, and any alloy-correction burdens embedded in the recycling route are incurred before Stage D
substitution_ratio_yield_mapping: In the contemporary external_stageD implementation, the embedded credit is stripped and the recovered-yield scalar is inferred as 1.050300, with recycle_sub_ratio = 1.0, yielding 1.050300 kg avoided product per kg route basis
downscaling_exclusion_rule: No additional discretionary downscaling is applied in the deterministic baseline beyond the implemented yield realization. If billet-equivalence is not defensible, the claim is excluded

marginal_supplier_representation: Route-specific avoided primary-aluminium credit nodes, including baseline and inert-overlay forms, as documented in Appendices B and D
equivalence_gate: Output must pass the billet-equivalence and quality / eligibility gate used to justify displacement of extrusion-grade billet/feedstock
conditioning_required_before_credit: Shredding, degreasing, consolidation, trimming, and route-side realization are incurred before Stage D
substitution_ratio_yield_mapping: Deterministic baseline realization governed by route yields: shred yield x FSC retained yield x substitution ratio = 0.80 x 0.952 x 1.0 = 0.7616 kg credited billet-equivalent output per kg qualifying chain input. Any pass-share reduction is treated as a robustness / sensitivity variant rather than the deterministic default
downscaling_exclusion_rule: Non-qualifying output receives no Stage D credit. Partial pass shares are treated as reduced-claim variants

displaced_product_or_service: Gaseous hydrogen represented through a low-pressure hydrogen market proxy
marginal_supplier_representation: Contemporary: foreground-constructed hydrogen central case documented in Appendix D. Prospective: scenario-conditioned hydrogen representation implemented through the h2_market_low_pressure_proxy_CA_prospect_locpref__<scenario> proxy family
equivalence_gate: Hydrogen must be purified to the product basis represented by the low-pressure hydrogen receiving-system proxy
conditioning_required_before_credit: Hydrolysis reaction and PSA purification are included before credit. No separate medium-pressure compression basis is retained in the final implementation
substitution_ratio_yield_mapping: Credited hydrogen = reacted aluminium x (3M_H2 / 2M_Al) x R_PSA. Deterministic baselines are approximately 0.0587 kg H2/kg gate scrap in 2025 and 0.0860 kg H2/kg gate scrap in 2050
downscaling_exclusion_rule: If the hydrogen product basis cannot be defended, the claim is excluded

marginal_supplier_representation: Implemented through the aloh3_market_proxy foreground proxy family, linked to a global aluminium-hydroxide market basis
equivalence_gate: Recovered solids must remain compatible with the background aluminium-hydroxide supply proxy
conditioning_required_before_credit: No additional drying or separate conditioning step is imposed in the final implementation. Water associated with the reaction is assumed to evaporate or separate to the biosphere rather than requiring a separate conditioning burden on the Al(OH)3 product
substitution_ratio_yield_mapping: Credited quantity based on stoichiometric recovery from reacted aluminium: reacted aluminium x M_Al(OH)3 / M_Al. Deterministic baselines are approximately 1.97 kg Al(OH)3/kg gate scrap in 2025 and 2.33 kg Al(OH)3/kg gate scrap in 2050
downscaling_exclusion_rule: If the solids stream cannot be defended as market-compatible, the claim is excluded
